title: Paper Jam in Tray 1
shortDescription: Paper is jammed in the main paper tray.
fullDescription: Paper is jammed in Tray 1 and must be cleared.

causes.cause: Primary cause for paper jam in tray 1

fixSteps.title: Clear Jam
fixSteps.instruction: Open the indicated area and carefully remove jammed paper.

fixSteps.title: Check for Fragments
fixSteps.instruction: Use a flashlight to check for small paper pieces.

fixSteps.title: Reload Paper
fixSteps.instruction: Reload paper and adjust guides.

fixSteps.title: Resume Printing
fixSteps.instruction: Close all covers and press Start to resume.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting or if your service contract covers this issue.

faq.a: Error 002-770 indicates paper is jammed in the main paper tray. Check the affected area and follow the troubleshooting steps.
Paper and supply errors usually halt printing until resolved. Some low-supply warnings allow continued printing.
For paper jams and supply replacements, no. For hardware errors that persist after power cycling, contact your Xerox service provider.

title: Toner Low (Cyan)
shortDescription: Cyan toner cartridge is running low.
fullDescription: Order replacement cyan toner.

fixSteps.title: Check Supply Level
fixSteps.instruction: View the supply status on the control panel.

fixSteps.title: Order Replacement
fixSteps.instruction: Order the correct Xerox supply for your model.

fixSteps.title: Replace Supply
fixSteps.instruction: Follow the on-screen guide to replace the indicated supply.

fixSteps.title: Confirm Replacement
fixSteps.instruction: The printer automatically detects new supplies. Confirm if prompted.

shortDescription: The fuser unit has reached end of life.
fullDescription: Replace the fuser maintenance kit.

causes.cause: Primary cause for fuser life end

fixSteps.title: Power Cycle
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off, unplug for 5 minutes, reconnect and restart.

fixSteps.title: Check Component
fixSteps.instruction: Verify the indicated component is properly installed.

fixSteps.title: Run Diagnostics
fixSteps.instruction: Run the printer's built-in diagnostic from the admin menu.

fixSteps.title: Contact Xerox Service
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, contact Xerox support or your service contract provider.

title: Network Connection Error
shortDescription: Network connection failed.
fullDescription: The printer lost its network connection.

causes.cause: Primary cause for network connection error

fixSteps.title: Check Connection
fixSteps.instruction: Verify network cable or Wi-Fi status.

fixSteps.title: Restart Network
fixSteps.instruction: Restart the router and printer.

fixSteps.title: Verify Settings
fixSteps.instruction: Check IP address, subnet mask, and gateway in the network menu.

fixSteps.title: Contact IT Support
fixSteps.instruction: For authentication or directory errors, contact your IT administrator.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting or if your service contract covers this issue.
